---
name: Bug report
about: Something doesn't work the way it should
title: "<short description of the bug>"
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A clear description of the actual behavior.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Reproduction

Steps to reproduce, ideally a minimal `ribosome.json` / command that
triggers it.

## Environment

- ribosome version / commit:
- OS:
- Node/Bun version (if relevant):

## Notes

Anything else — logs, links to related issues, whether this affects a
stub/skeleton part of the codebase (see [Status](../../README.md#status)).
